name: codeforge
description: CodeForge — model-adaptive AI coding toolkit. Code review, security, TDD, architecture, docs, and evals. Same output quality across Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini.

interface.shortDescription: Model-adaptive AI coding toolkit — review, security, TDD, arch, docs, evals.
defaultPrompt: Use codeforge:tdd to write failing tests before implementing any feature.
Use codeforge:review to audit code before merging.
Use codeforge:secure to scan for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
